title: asarum viridiflorum
intro: Asarum viridiflorum, also known as Green Keel or Green Aukland, is a species of flowering plant in the birthwort family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in New Zealand, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to promote digestive health and reduce stress.
